title: Device Settings  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Custom Button "Other Providers" option is greyed out and inaccessible when Microsoft Teams is connected on Falcon headsets
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Ensure a Falcon headset (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) is paired and connected to the Android device.
Ensure the same headset is also connected to a PC running Microsoft Teams.
Navigate to Home → Device Settings → [Connected Falcon Headset Name].
Observe the available options under Custom Button settings.
expected: The Custom Button settings should display two options: "Microsoft Teams" (selected by default) and "Other Providers". "Other Providers" should be greyed out and inaccessible. A message should be displayed: "Microsoft Teams is connected. Other Providers is not available when Microsoft Teams is connected."
